description:
SpecRegistry is a self-contained data structure with its own API
(register, register_any_key_at, resolve, any_key, iter, len).
It currently lives buried in ir_codegen.rs. Move it to its own file.

CREATE src/spec_registry.rs containing:
  - The SpecId type (currently in fz_ir or ir_codegen — check where it lives)
  - The SpecRegistry struct and its full impl block
  - All imports it needs

UPDATE src/ir_codegen.rs:
  - Remove SpecRegistry struct and impl
  - Add: use crate::spec_registry::{SpecRegistry, SpecId};  (or mod spec_registry; pub use ...)

UPDATE src/main.rs or lib root:
  - Add mod spec_registry; if needed

SpecId location: grep for 'pub struct SpecId' to find its current home before moving.
If SpecId is in fz_ir.rs, leave it there and import from both files.

cargo build must produce zero warnings. All tests must pass.
title: fz-cg2.8 extract SpecRegistry into src/spec_registry.rs
